title: Lunar Block Overlay
description: Lunar Block Overlay is a mod that enhances block selection by allowing players to customize the overlay color and thickness.🚀
body:
Lunar Block Overlay
📝 Description:

Lunar Block Overlay is a mod that enhances the block selection outline with customizable colors and adjustable thickness. This mod is perfect for builders, PvPers, and anyone who wants a clearer visual when selecting blocks.

🎮 How to Use:
Change Overlay Color: Press \ to cycle through Colors.
**Adjust Thickness:** Press + to increase and - to decrease. 
**Chat Notifications:** Each change is displayed in chat, with the color name appearing in its respective color.
**Change key bindings:** All key bindings can be changed through the Minecraft control menu.

For more help you can contact me on my discord server or DM me worst_boy
